MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MAX SANEL'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

Petitioners' unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon" is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
